# bai Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    bai = {
      source  = "BrightDotAi/s3tables"
      version = "~> 1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "bai" {
  region  = "us-east-1"  # optional — falls back to AWS_REGION / AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
  profile = "my-profile" # optional — falls back to AWS_PROFILE
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `profile` (String) AWS IAM Profile. Defaults to the value of the `AWS_PROFILE` environment variable.
- `region` (String) AWS region. Defaults to the value of the `AWS_REGION` / `AWS_DEFAULT_REGION` environment variables.
